roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOTION TO MODIFY RESTITUTION ORDER FILED

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/977/X:DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE HAS PAID VICTIM JENNIFER WHITEHOUSE IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,156,75,/ /X:CR110 & CR111 WERE NOT ORDERED FILED BY THE COURT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWINGREASON: NO FURTHER  APPEARANCES REGARDING RESTITUTION/X: RESTITUTION ORDERFROM 02-02-21 HAS BEEN DEEMED PAID IN FULL/

/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:THE PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO THE FOLLOWING VICTIM RESTITUTION AMOUNTS:/X:AS TO VICTIM JENNIFER WHITEHOUSE - DEFENDANT SHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $12,686,73/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL NOTES THAT $3,000 OF THIS RESTITUTION IS FOR MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING SPECIFICALLY/X:AS TO VICTIM SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY - DEFENDANTSHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $323,66/X:NO CR-110'OR 111'S HAVE BEEN SUBMITTED FOR FILING AT THIS TIME/

/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/DAWF/X:VICTIM JENNIFER WHITEHOUSE REQUESTED $11,360,77 FOR RESTITUTION/X:VICTIM  THE SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE REQUESTED $323,66 FOR RESTITUTION/CTORD:RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIMS, NICHOLAS RIVELLI AND JIE ZHU, REMAIN A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT/RESTR/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWF/

/CAL SENTENCE/JAVS/DAWT/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 20D/CTS 2/SWAPD 03-13-20/PF390 18/VF2:150/FOP1:9 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/CTORD:REPORTING TO COLLECTIONS UNIT STAYED UNTIL 03-13-20/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/REMA/4019HALF/CONTD APD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATIONDEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:05-05-20/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/
/CAL:PLEA IN ABSENTIA/JAVS/DAWT/AMEND:TO ADD COUNT 3, VC23152(B), MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL//DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
